title: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for Swift AlgoTest
description: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for Swift AlgoTest
no_spec_change_rationale: This governance-only migration assigns stable requirement IDs and configures SpecSync and Trust without changing Swift AlgoTest runtime behavior or existing requirement semantics.
acceptance_criteria: Strict SpecSync passes at advisory threshold 0; all four agent integrations are installed; Trust doctor passes; Swift build and all 83 deterministic tests pass; macOS, Linux, dependencies, DocC, and live sandbox boundaries remain intact
